tests.name: Portal: Lab results load with category grouping
preconditions: Patient with 5+ lab results across 2+ categories
tests.expected_result: Results grouped by category (Hematology, Chemistry, etc.), sorted by date descending

tests.name: Portal: Lab results filter by category
tests.expected_result: Only hematology results shown

tests.name: Portal: Lab results filter abnormal only
preconditions: Mix of normal and abnormal results
tests.expected_result: Only results with status != normal shown

tests.name: Portal: Lab result color coding matches reference range
tests.expected_result: Icon ↑, text-severity-severe, aria-label 'Above normal range'. Value > 1.5x refMax → text-severity-critical with aria-live='assertive'

tests.name: Portal: Sparkline renders with ≥3 data points
tests.expected_result: SVG sparkline visible with reference range shaded band. <3 data points → no sparkline

tests.name: Portal: Consent toggle → AuditLog entry
tests.expected_result: AuditLog entry with action CONSENT_CHANGED, before/after values

tests.name: Portal: Download data export → ZIP generated
tests.expected_result: ZIP file downloaded containing patient data per LGPD Art. 18

tests.name: Portal: Appointment slots respect DoctorPreferences
tests.expected_result: Slots shown only within 08:00-17:00, 30-min intervals

tests.name: Portal: Minimum advance notice enforced
steps: Try to book slot 6 hours from now
tests.expected_result: Slot shown as unavailable (within 24h notice window)

tests.name: Portal: Magic link auth flow
tests.expected_result: Token verified, session created, redirect to portal dashboard

tests.name: Portal: Session expiry → redirect to login
tests.expected_result: Redirect to /portal/auth/login with return URL

tests.name: Portal: All pages render at 375px without horizontal scroll
tests.expected_result: document.documentElement.scrollWidth <= clientWidth on every page

tests.name: E-Prescribing: A1 signing — hash signed client-side, valid server-side
tests.expected_result: SignatureResult returned with valid signature, certificate PEM, signing time
invariant_coverage: CYRUS: private key never on server

tests.name: E-Prescribing: A3 signing — OAuth redirect flow
tests.expected_result: Signed hash returned via callback URL

tests.name: E-Prescribing: PIN fallback — prescription signed
tests.expected_result: SignatureResult with method='PIN', HMAC signature

tests.name: E-Prescribing: Drug interaction blocks signing
tests.expected_result: safe=false, interaction DRUG-001 with severity severe, must acknowledge before signing

tests.name: E-Prescribing: PDF generated with all required fields
tests.expected_result: PDF contains: clinic header, prescriber CRM, medications table, QR code, signature block, diagnosis
invariant_coverage: RUTH: CRM number, digital signature indicator

tests.name: E-Prescribing: Verify page — valid hash shows prescriber info
tests.expected_result: VALID state: green checkmark, prescriber name, CRM, signing date. ZERO patient PHI.
invariant_coverage: CYRUS: no PHI on public page

tests.name: E-Prescribing: Verify page — invalid hash → NOT_FOUND
tests.expected_result: NOT_FOUND state: gray question mark

tests.name: E-Prescribing: Verify page — tampered hash → TAMPERED
steps: Verify with original hash after data change
tests.expected_result: TAMPERED state: red warning

tests.name: E-Prescribing: AI-suggested medication gets SaMD disclaimer
tests.expected_result: PDF contains AI disclaimer section (RUTH invariant)
invariant_coverage: RUTH: SaMD disclaimer on AI suggestions

tests.name: E-Prescribing: Certificate upload + PEM extraction
tests.expected_result: Certificate PEM stored, public key extracted, private key NOT stored

tests.name: RNDS: Valid certificate → token received
tests.expected_result: Bearer token returned with 1800s expiry

tests.name: RNDS: Expired certificate → 401 + renewal prompt
tests.expected_result: Error with message 'certificate expired', prompt to renew

tests.name: RNDS: LabResult push → FHIR Observation conversion
tests.expected_result: FHIR Bundle created with Composition + Observation + Patient refs. LOINC code in Observation.code.

tests.name: RNDS: Patient without RNDS consent → push blocked
tests.expected_result: status: 'skipped', error: 'consent not granted'

tests.name: RNDS: Pull deduplicates lab results by LOINC + date
preconditions: Local lab result matching RNDS record (same LOINC, same date)
tests.expected_result: Existing record not duplicated. If values differ → SyncConflict created.

tests.name: RNDS: Conflict detection → SyncConflict record
preconditions: Local value 14.2 g/dL, RNDS value 14.5 g/dL for same LOINC+date
tests.expected_result: SyncConflict created with localData and rndsData for clinician review

tests.name: RNDS: Feature flag disabled → no sync operations
tests.expected_result: Both return status: 'skipped' immediately

tests.name: RNDS: Connection test → success response
tests.expected_result: success: true, message includes environment name

tests.name: Lab Order: Panel selection adds all LOINC codes
tests.expected_result: 8 LOINC codes added to order (WBC, RBC, Hemoglobin, etc.)

tests.name: Lab Order: Clinical indication required
tests.expected_result: Validation error: clinical indication required

tests.name: Lab Order: Patient prep auto-generated
tests.expected_result: Shows 'Fasting 12 hours' from lab-order-panels.json

tests.name: Lab Order: Status lifecycle
steps: Track through ORDERED → COLLECTED → PROCESSING → RESULTED → REVIEWED
tests.expected_result: Status transitions correctly, SSE event on each change

tests.name: Lab Order: SSE event on status change
preconditions: SSE connected, lab order in PROCESSING
steps: Lab order status changes to RESULTED
tests.expected_result: encounter_updated SSE event received with lab result data

tests.name: Lab Order: Overdue indicator after 7 days
preconditions: Lab order created 8 days ago, still ORDERED
tests.expected_result: Overdue badge with amber color shown

tests.name: Lab Order: LOINC typeahead search
tests.expected_result: Matching LOINC codes returned after 300ms debounce (718-7, 4548-4, etc.)

tests.name: Lab Order: Cross-tenant isolation
preconditions: User in org A, order in org B
tests.expected_result: 404 Not Found (CYRUS: tenant isolation)
